memoryArtifacts.headline: John, Duke of Berry was the owner of the Fonthill vase, made in Jingdezhen, China, the earliest piece of Chinese porcelain documented to reach Europe, in 1338.[7]
Page from the calendar of the Très Riches Heures showing the household of John, Duke of Berry exchanging New Year gifts. The Duke is seated at the right, in blue.
Image of John, Duke of Berry from the Très Riches Heures
Coat of arms of John, Duke of Berry, 1360.

popularStory.headline: Jean Ier de Berry
popularStory.description:
Jean Ier de Berry, dit Jean le Magnifique, (30 novembre 1340 à Vincennes - 15 juin 1416 à Paris) est le troisième fils du roi de France, Jean II dit le Bon et de Bonne de Luxembourg.

L'homme politiqu …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry於1340年11月30日出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾度布斯麥頌斯 度 博瓦 利艾福雷蒙特時，他的父親Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France21歲，母親Bonne de Luxembourg25歲。他於1360年10月17日與Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry在法國藍多-盧希隆奧德卡爾卡頌結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1416年6月15日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年75歲，埋葬在法國崔傑布格斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry于1340年11月30日出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾度布斯麥頌斯 度 博瓦 利艾福雷蒙特时，他的父亲Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France21岁，母亲Bonne de Luxembourg25岁。他于1360年10月17日与Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry在法国藍多-盧希隆奧德卡爾卡頌结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1416年6月15日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年75岁，埋葬在法国崔傑布格斯。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Valois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Henri, Normand, Alcide, Armand, Emilien, Gilberte, Gilles, Herve, Jacques, Lucien.
habitational name from (Le) Valois, the name of a few places in France, e.g. in Forez and Limousin.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry was born on 30 November 1340, in Maisons du Bois Lièvremont, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, his father, Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France, was 21 and his mother, Bonne de Luxembourg, was 25. He married Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry on 17 October 1360, in Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, France. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 15 June 1416, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 75, and was buried in Bourges, Cher, Centre, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry est né le 30 novembre 1340, à Maisons du Bois Lièvremont, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Bonne de Luxembourg, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry le 17 octobre 1360, à Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, France. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 15 juin 1416, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Bourges, Cher, Centre, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry am 30. November 1340 in Maisons du Bois Lièvremont, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France 21 und seine Mutter Bonne de Luxembourg 25. Er hat am 17. Oktober 1360 in Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Juni 1416 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Bourges, Cher, Centre, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry è nato il il 30 novembre 1340 nel Maisons du Bois Lièvremont, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, il suo padre, Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Bonne de Luxembourg, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry il 17 ottobre 1360, nel Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 15 giugno 1416, nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Bourges, Cher, Centre, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berryが1340年11月30日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeドウブズメイソンス ダ ボイス リevレモントで生まれた時，父Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de Franceは21歳，母Bonne de Luxembourgは25歳であった。1360年10月17日にフランスラングエドク-ロウシロンアウドカーカソンでJeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1416年6月15日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで75歳で死去し，フランスセントアチャーボウルジェズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry(이)가 1340년 11월 30일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 다브스 메이손스 드 보이스 리e브렘트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Bonne de Luxembourg(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1360년 10월 17일 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 오드 카르캐손에서 Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1416년 6월 15일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세트르 처 부르그스에 묻혔다.

pt.30 November 1340–15 June 1416: 30 de novembro de 1340–15 de junho de 1416
pt.Arrondissement de Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alp: Arrondissement de Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, França
pt.Maisons du Bois Lièvremont, Doubs, Bourg: Maisons du Bois Lièvremont, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry nasceu em 30 de novembro de 1340, em Maisons du Bois Lièvremont, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Bonne de Luxembourg, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry em 17 de outubro de 1360, em Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de junho de 1416, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Bourges, Cher, Centre, França.

ru.Arrondissement de Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alp: аррондиссемент де лен, рoн, рoне-алпесь, Франция
ru.Maisons du Bois Lièvremont, Doubs, Bourg: меисонс ду боис лиeвремонт, доубс, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry родился 30 ноября 1340 г. в местности меисонс ду боис лиeвремонт, доубс, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Bonne de Luxembourg, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry 17 октября 1360 г. в местности каркассонн, ауд, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 15 июня 1416 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности бургесь, чир, кентр, Франция.

es.Maisons du Bois Lièvremont, Doubs, Bourg: Maisons du Bois Lièvremont, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry nació el 30 de noviembre de 1340, en Maisons du Bois Lièvremont, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Bonne de Luxembourg, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry el 17 de octubre de 1360, en Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 15 de junio de 1416, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Bourges, Cher, Centre, Francia.
